Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); ['src/views/GestionAnimals.vue','src/views/GestionMouvements.vue','src/views/DashboardView.vue','src/router/index.js'].forEach\(f => { const c = fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\); const issues = []; if \(f.includes\('Animals'\) && c.includes\('vaccinationStatus'\)\) issues.push\('still has vaccinationStatus'\); if \(f.includes\('Mouv'\) && c.includes\('moveDate'\)\) issues.push\('still has moveDate'\); if \(f.includes\('Dashboard'\) && c.includes\('/inspections'\)\) issues.push\('still has /inspections'\); if \(f.includes\('router'\) && !c.includes\('control-sessions'\)\) issues.push\('missing control-sessions route'\); console.log\(f + ': ' + \(issues.length ? issues.join\(', '\) : 'OK'\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const files = ['src/views/ControlSessions.vue','src/views/Reproductions.vue','src/views/SanitaryCampaigns.vue','src/views/AdminSettings.vue','src/views/FraudManagement.vue']; files.forEach\(f => { try { fs.accessSync\(f\); console.log\(f + ': EXISTS'\); } catch { console.log\(f + ': MISSING'\); } }\);")
